title: Dark Gooey Jamaican Squid Skillet
description: A pungent and nostalgic Jamaican dish featuring squid, this recipe is halal-friendly and cooked to perfection on a tava-griddle.

ingredients.name: squid tubes
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the tava-griddle over medium heat and add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil.
Add the squid pieces and cook until they are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the squid from the griddle and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil to the griddle.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet peppers, garlic, and ginger to the griddle and cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add the flour to the griddle and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the soy sauce, brown sugar, and 1/4 cup of water to the griddle, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked squid back to the griddle and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the squid is fully coated and the sauce is gooey.
